caption: A man dressed in a blue traditional garment performs a martial arts routine with a staff in a large, well-lit hall. He is positioned in the center of a blue floor mat, surrounded by a seated audience of people in various casual and formal attire. The room features high ceilings with recessed lighting and light-colored walls. In the initial moments, the man moves dynamically, swinging the staff across his body and shifting his weight in a wide stance. As the sequence progresses, he transitions his movements, swinging the staff from one side to the other and ending in a balanced, athletic posture. The audience remains seated and observant throughout the performance. There are no visible logos or on-screen text. The scene remains focused on the performer's fluid motions and the static environment of the hall.
